## Pull Request Checklist

### Description
<!-- Brief description of the changes made in this PR -->

### Linked Issue
<!-- Closes #123 or Related to #123 -->

### Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Code refactoring

### Testing
- [ ] Unit tests pass
- [ ] Integration tests pass
- [ ] Documentation tests pass (`cargo doc --no-deps`)
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] Tier 2 compatibility test run (if event format changed)

### Documentation
- [ ] API documentation updated for public changes
- [ ] README updated (if needed)
- [ ] Examples updated (if needed)
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry added

### Code Quality
- [ ] Code formatted with `cargo fmt`
- [ ] No clippy warnings (`cargo clippy -- -D warnings`)
- [ ] All public items have documentation
- [ ] License headers included on new files

### Review Requirements
- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] At least one code owner review
- [ ] CI checks pass
- [ ] Security considerations addressed (if applicable)

## Additional Context
<!-- Any additional context, screenshots, or notes -->

## Testing Instructions
<!-- How to test these changes -->

## Breaking Changes
<!-- List any breaking changes, or state "None" -->

## Questions
<!-- Any questions for reviewers -->
